title: EzzHardcore
description: This hardcore plugin allows you to set timed bans for players who die. Instead of losing their progress forever, players are banned for a specific duration and can join again once the time is up.
body:
### Features
EzzHardcore is a highly configurable Minecraft plugin which provides an advanced death system for your server. Instead of a permanent death, you can choose between a temporary ban or a timed spectator mode. Players in spectator mode receive a message telling them how long they will remain in spectator mode. Once the time is up, the plugin automatically teleports them back to their spawn point or bed and sets them back to survival mode. You can fully customize all times and messages in the configuration.

### Commands

_/ezzhardcore list_ - Shows all currently punished players and their remaining time.

_/ezzhardcore unban <Player>_ - Opens a GUI to immediately revive or unban a player.

_/ezzhardcore reload_ - Reloads the config file to apply changes instantly.

### Permissions

**ezzhardcore.use** - Grants access to all plugin commands and management menus.

**ezzhardcore.bypass.ban** - Protects the player from being banned or put into spectator mode upon death.
